title: 甘くて小さいヒーロー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days after the Swan Stakes...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer, can I talk to you?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm worried about Biko.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I listen carefully to what she has to say, and it
seems Biko Pegasus hasn't been herself recently.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
She smiles like normal, but sometimes, it's like
she's walking around with a big cloud over her
head.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Well, she was really down during the Sprinters S...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was so shocked by your running, and
their eyes were glittering as they watched you...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Yet, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I feel like she's been getting sadder and sadder
since then...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Since she's probably worrying about her races, I
was wondering what I could do to help her...
choice_data_list: How about we take her out for a day of fun?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how spending a fun day out can help
relieve her stress and make it easier for her to
open up about what's bothering her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You're right! Nice idea, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! There are oranges as far as the eye can
see!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! The air smells so sweet too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of us decide to go orange picking
together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since it's peak orange season, the orchard is
going all-out. The staff is giving out balloons to
kids on their way home, and there are stands full
of souvenirs lined up everywhere. It's in full swing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone is having a great time picking and
choosing their own oranges.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Bono, check out my haul! I've picked so many
sweet-smelling oranges!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wow, that's great! Did you know? The smaller
oranges are more buono because they're packed
full of sweet goodness!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Th-they are?! You're so knowledgeable, Bono.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They might be small, but they're delicious and
cool. I remembered that orange fact right away
because it reminded me of you, Biko.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: O-oh...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Biko?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not cool at all! I can't even nab a victory
during the most decisive moment in a race!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I suck at maintaining my position, and I can't ever
break through the pack when I get blocked in!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
At this rate... I'll never inspire courage in
anyone...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, Biko...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Gah! Sorry! Forget I said anything!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Waaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, a girl cries out as a red balloon slips
from her hand and climbs high into the sky.

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, sweetie, but there's no way to get it
back. Let's go get a new one, okay?

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
No! This is the last time I'm gonna get to play with
Mio, and I wanna have the same balloon as her!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Oh... That balloon must mean so much to her...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Have no fear! I swear upon my honor that I'll get
it back for you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Let's go too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We chase after Biko Pegasus and spot her at the
top of a tree, reaching out for the balloon which
had become entangled in its branches.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Nrghhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But try as she might, the balloon is just too far
away for her short arms to reach.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
choice_data_list: This is too dangerous. I'm going up there.
This is too dangerous. I'm going up there.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Wait, don't. I'm sure Biko will be able to get it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I know she will.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: J-just a little more... Almost there!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Be careful, Biko!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Bono!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Thanks, but I'm fine! Just hang on a moment!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: All right, here I go! Nnngh... Hiya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biko Pegasus grips on to a branch, lunges
forward, and snatches the balloon! But just when
she does...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Oh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The branch snaps, sending her plummeting
down...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And straight into Hishi Akebono's waiting arms.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: S-sorry, Bono! Are you all right?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yep, yep! You were so cool just now, Biko!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: You got the balloon back!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono looks with intense admiration at
Biko Pegasus, who's clutching the balloon tightly
in her grasp.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Whew... So much happened today, but it was a
lot of fun! We got a lot of oranges too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
What should I make with them once we get back?
Marmalade would be nice, but jam would be
good too...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Which do you prefer, Biko?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? Oh! Sorry! I wasn't listening!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, how about we split an orange? I bet this one
will taste extra buono!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono picks a small orange from her pile,
peels it, and hands half of it to Biko Pegasus.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Thanks! Munch... Whoa, you're right! It's super sweet and yummy!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...Hey, Biko? I really do think you're cool.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I can only imagine the struggles you face, since I
don't have the same physique as you, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It must be really hard to get a good position in a
race and break out when you're blocked in
because of your stature...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And it must be so frustrating not being able to
unleash your final sprint because other people
disrupted your timing, and you can't reach the
finish line the way you want...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: But despite all that, you keep pushing forward.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
You never give up, no matter how difficult things
are or how much it hurts.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I think that's why you were able to get that
balloon back.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Bono...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
All those parts of you are what make you a hero
to me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I think everybody will come to see you that way
too someday.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's soft, serene flow of words makes
Biko Pegasus still momentarily.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's the matter?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Bono... Yeah, you're right...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry! I'm not doing anywhere near as well as I
thought I could in my races...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you even had to come to my rescue
earlier. I started thinking of myself as a real
failure...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Part of me started wondering if maybe—just
maybe—I didn't have what it takes to be a hero.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: But that's all in the past!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
I won't get disheartened! No matter how many
times I'm brought to my knees, I'll get right back
up!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! That's the Biko I know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Biko Pegasus in a better mood makes
Hishi Akebono smile brightly as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's when I remember something she said to me
previously.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's not just anyone running either—it's me and
Biko, so I'm sure everyone'll come out of it feeling
full and satisfied!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The strong bond between Hishi Akebono and
Biko Pegasus will surely never change.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today made that fact crystal clear.
